newsSince: Only routine/minor items since June 9: AGM June 9 confirmed a 0.40 EUR dividend and re-elected the supervisory board chair; Brian Soller named president of Jenoptik Optical Systems LLC (June 11) and new photonics group leadership starts Aug 1. The needle-moving event (Q1 order intake +74% with a major semiconductor order, May 12) predates the window.

sources.label: Brian Soller named president of Jenoptik Optical Systems LLC (June 11)

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens: photonics/metrology is a tangential scaling enabler. Only routine news since Jun 9 (AGM, leadership), so hold. Slight +1 for durable semicap order momentum (Q1 intake +74%, major chip order) underpinning the +8.2% move, but that catalyst predates the window.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Semiconductor & Advanced Manufacturing order momentum (Q1 intake +74%)
verdicts.primaryRisk: Indirect scaling linkage; +132% YTD leaves little residual asymmetry
verdicts.bull: Quiet semicap/photonics beneficiary; Q1 order intake +74% YoY on a major semiconductor order; FY26 EBITDA margin guide 19-21%.
verdicts.neutral: Low-rank tangential scaling name; strong order book but only routine news since June 9.
verdicts.bear: +132% YTD re-rating, small-cap, and scaling linkage is indirect; lumpy single-order intake.
